steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the duration of the EVA. The answer must lead with or prominently feature the time length (7 hours and 55 minutes).

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: focuses on the task performed during the spacewalk, not how long it lasted. ✗
  • Choice B: opens with "Lasting 7 hours and 55 minutes," placing duration first and connecting it to the EVA's rank among the longest spacewalks ever. ✓
  • Choice C: omits any duration information entirely. ✗
  • Choice D: misapplies the Expedition 14 mission dates to the EVA itself rather than stating the EVA's actual duration. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
